steps.title: Recognize the slope-intercept form
steps.content: The equation $y = \frac{7x}{13} - 19$ is already in slope-intercept form $$y = mx + b$$ where the slope is $m$, the coefficient of $x$, and the y-intercept is $b$.

steps.title: Extract the slope
steps.content:
The coefficient of $x$ in the equation is $\frac{7}{13}$. Therefore, the slope is $\frac{7}{13}$.
The answer is 7/13.
